text: Passing through clean glass doors, I become acutely aware of my own reflection and the structure of space itself. The environment feels sterile yet purposeful, charged with intention. Upon stepping further in and observing the 'R+D' exhibit, I am struck by the contrast of creativity against order. The innovative displays and intentional arrangement pull my mind to contemplate how structure and exploration coexist. I feel a mixture of curiosity and wonder, as if I am being invited to actively participate in the evolution of knowledge itself.
